events.title: Monthly Club Meet
events.description: Last Wednesday of the month — bring something to share!

events.title: Winter Warmer
events.description: Our annual Winter gettogether. Bring along your favourite dark and strong beers as we see off the last of Winter in style.

events.title: Monthly Club Meet with Belgian Beer Competition
events.description:
Don't forget your Belgian Brews. Will you take home the trophy?

Usual tastings and club affairs to follow the comp.

events.title: Stout Extravaganza by Westgate Brewers
events.description:
Australia's largest amateur stout competition!
11/07/2026 is the cutoff date for entries.
There are 3 main categories: Porter, Stout and Strong Stout.
Check the website for further details: https://www.westgatebrewers.org/stout-extravaganza/
Dropoff locations are Backyard Homebrew Co in Brooklyn, Keg King in Springvale and The Great Beyond in Coburg

events.title: Rocktoberfest
events.description:
Hosted by Rock & Ranges.
They will be brewing Paul's Dunkel recipe as a special release for the event, so definitely worth heading along.
More details to come.

events.title: Oktoberfest
events.description:
Our annual Oktoberfest celebration!
Bring your best German (or German adjacent) beers.
More details to come.

events.title: VicBrew cutoff
events.description:
This is the cutoff date for entries into VicBrew.
We have some fantastic brewers here in the Ranges, would love to see us putting some entries in!
